word: G1072 - γεμίζω - gemízō - ghem-id'-zo - Fill full

sections.paragraph:
- Original: γεμίζω

- Transliteration: Gemizo

- Phonetic: ghem-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to fill, fill full

- Origin: transitive from G1073

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Transitive from G1073; to fill entirely: - fill (be) full.
